study.quote: The expert in anything was once a beginner.
study.author: Helen Hayes

study.quote: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
study.author: Nelson Mandela

study.quote: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
study.author: Benjamin Franklin

study.quote: The beautiful thing about learning is nobody can take it away from you.
study.author: B.B. King

study.quote: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
study.author: Mahatma Gandhi

study.quote: The roots of education are bitter, but the fruit is sweet.
study.author: Aristotle

study.quote: Learning is a treasure that will follow its owner everywhere.
study.author: Chinese Proverb

study.quote: Study without desire spoils the memory.
study.author: Leonardo da Vinci

study.quote: Success doesn’t come to you, you go to it.
study.author: Marva Collins

coding.quote: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
coding.author: Linus Torvalds

coding.quote: Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute.
coding.author: Harold Abelson

coding.quote: Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it’s bad.
coding.author: Cory House

coding.quote: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
coding.author: John Johnson

coding.quote: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
coding.author: Martin Fowler

coding.quote: Programming isn’t about what you know; it’s about what you can figure out.
coding.author: Chris Pine

coding.quote: Simplicity is the soul of efficiency.
coding.author: Austin Freeman

coding.quote: Fix the cause, not the symptom.
coding.author: Steve Maguire

coding.quote: The best error message is the one that never shows up.
coding.author: Thomas Fuchs

coding.quote: Before software can be reusable it first has to be usable.
coding.author: Ralph Johnson

creativity.quote: You can’t use up creativity. The more you use, the more you have.
creativity.author: Maya Angelou

creativity.quote: Imagination is everything. It is the preview of life’s coming attractions.
creativity.author: Albert Einstein

creativity.quote: To live a creative life, we must lose our fear of being wrong.
creativity.author: Joseph Chilton Pearce

creativity.quote: The chief enemy of creativity is good sense.
creativity.author: Pablo Picasso

creativity.quote: You can’t wait for inspiration, you have to go after it with a club.
creativity.author: Jack London

creativity.quote: Every artist was first an amateur.
creativity.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

creativity.quote: Originality is nothing but judicious imitation.
creativity.author: Voltaire

creativity.quote: The worst enemy to creativity is self-doubt.
creativity.author: Sylvia Plath

success.quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
success.author: Winston Churchill

success.quote: Don’t be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
success.author: John D. Rockefeller

success.quote: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
success.author: Thomas Jefferson

success.quote: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
success.author: Henry David Thoreau

success.quote: Opportunities don’t happen. You create them.
success.author: Chris Grosser

success.quote: Don’t let the fear of losing be greater than the excitement of winning.
success.author: Robert Kiyosaki

success.quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
success.author: Walt Disney

success.quote: Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
success.author: Winston Churchill

success.quote: Fall seven times and stand up eight.
success.author: Japanese Proverb

success.quote: The secret of success is to do the common thing uncommonly well.
success.author: John D. Rockefeller Jr.

focus.quote: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
focus.author: Aristotle

focus.quote: Starve your distractions, feed your focus.
focus.author: Unknown

focus.quote: You can’t depend on your eyes when your imagination is out of focus.
focus.author: Mark Twain

focus.quote: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
focus.author: Tim Ferriss

focus.quote: Concentrate all your thoughts upon the work at hand. The sun’s rays do not burn until brought to a focus.
focus.author: Alexander Graham Bell

focus.quote: Lack of direction, not lack of time, is the problem. We all have twenty-four hour days.
focus.author: Zig Ziglar

focus.quote: The successful warrior is the average man, with laser-like focus.
focus.author: Bruce Lee

focus.quote: Focus is the key to success.
focus.author: Unknown

focus.quote: You can do anything, but not everything.
focus.author: David Allen
